pillars.title: Cross-Ministry Alignment
pillars.summary: Research governance embedded across ministries with shared ethics review, data-access rules, and publication standards.

pillars.title: Laboratory Stewardship
pillars.summary: Safe, secure, and compliant laboratory operations with asset tracking, waste stewardship, and emergency readiness.

pillars.title: Emerging Technology Oversight
pillars.summary: Gate reviews, sandbox releases, and readiness criteria for quantum, biotech, and autonomous system research.

pillars.title: Knowledge Transfer
pillars.summary: Publication, education pipelines, and commercialization tracks for protocol-funded research outputs.

pillars.title: Evidence Grading
pillars.summary: Hierarchical evidence grades tied to reproducibility, replication, and artifact quality under Protocol v3.0.

initiatives.title: Laboratory Modernization Program
initiatives.summary: Capital refresh, safety upgrades, and digital inventory across sovereign research laboratories.

initiatives.title: Open Research Data Commons
initiatives.summary: Shared, governed data repository with tiered access, provenance metadata, and release-graded exports.

initiatives.title: Replication Fellowship
initiatives.summary: Funded positions for independent replication studies with registered-report submissions and artifact review.

initiatives.title: Autonomous Systems Ethics Board
initiatives.summary: Cross-ministry review body for autonomous-system research proposals, incident reviews, and policy updates.

initiatives.title: Quantum Methods Fellowship
initiatives.summary: Fellowship for quantum algorithm research with benchmark requirements, artifact submission, and external review.

policy.title: Laboratory Safety Baseline
policy.summary: Minimum biosafety, chemical safety, and emergency-response requirements for all sovereign laboratories.

policy.title: Research Data Classification
policy.summary: Data-tier taxonomy, access-control rules, and encryption requirements for research datasets.

policy.title: Emerging Technology Oversight
policy.summary: Gate-process, sandbox rules, and readiness criteria for quantum, biotech, and autonomous research programs.

policy.title: Publication Integrity Policy
policy.summary: Anti-gaming rules, author-contribution attestations, artifact-review requirements, and correction workflows.

standards.title: Lab Asset Tracking Standard
standards.summary: Unique identifiers, custody chains, calibration schedules, and disposal records for laboratory equipment.

standards.title: Replication Evidence Grading
standards.summary: Evidence hierarchy from preregistered replication through published replication with artifact availability.

standards.title: Biosecurity Review Checklist
standards.summary: Structured review checklist for projects involving biological agents, dual-use research, and export-controlled methods.

standards.title: Quantum Readiness Criteria
standards.summary: Security, noise-tolerance, and interoperability criteria for upgrading quantum research to production workloads.
